'''MREM-02''', or '''Moreemohtwo''' was a kitchen droid owned by [[Corpo (Hutt)|Corpo]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. When Corpo enslaved famous chef [[Slabba Drewl]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Micah Giiett]] and [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] came to his rescue. Corpo then bet Drewl in a cooking contest with MREM-02. While Giiett distracted the audience, Koon swapped the ingredients. When Micah's [[Squirmer Stew]] won the competition, Corpo started hitting Moreemohtwo, causing it to fall over.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|7|Jedi Chef}} {{1st}}
